summary: CapyMatch Kanban Board Refinement Testing - All 10 features verified. Refinement values confirmed: scale(1.04) rotate(1.5deg) during drag, 24px+8px blur soft shadow, 0.05 tint/0.2 border on lane activation, inner glow on drop zone, 400ms settle animation with 0.25 teal glow, 200ms transitions, 0.65 top bar opacity, card state hierarchy (4px urgent border with inset shadow, 0.72 passive opacity), z-index 9999 during drag, cursor grabbing.
critical_code_review_comments: KanbanCard composedTransform correctly uses scale(1.04) rotate(1.5deg) (refined from 1.03/0.5deg)
dragShadow correctly uses 24px 48px blur (softer than old 20px 40px): '0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
Lane activation correctly uses 0.05 tint (rgba(13,148,136,0.05)) - stronger than old 0.03
Lane border correctly uses 0.2 opacity (rgba(13,148,136,0.2)) - stronger than old 0.12
Top bar glow correctly uses 12px blur with 55 opacity suffix on isDraggingOver
Settle animation correctly uses 400ms with 0.25 teal glow (rgba(13,148,136,0.25))
Card state hierarchy verified: urgent=4px left border + inset shadow, passive=0.72 opacity
All transitions use 200ms with cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) matching hero easing
z-index 9999 during drag ensures card appears above all elements
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data. Note: Test moved TEST_Dup from Added→Outreach during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kanban D&D refinement fully verified. All new values working: scale(1.04), rotate(1.5deg), 24px shadow blur, 0.05 lane tint, 0.2 lane border, inner glow, 400ms settle with 0.25 glow, 200ms transitions. Card positions after test: Added(0: empty), Outreach(4: Stanford, U of Florida, TEST_Dup, Creighton), Talking(3: Emory, UCLA, Florida Atlantic), Visit(0), Offered(0).

verified_features.lane_activation_border_02: ✅ PASS - Lane border uses rgba(13,148,136,0.2) on isDraggingOver
verified_features.lane_header_contrast_boost: ✅ PASS - Header color changes to 'var(--cm-text, #0f172a)' on isDraggingOver
verified_features.top_bar_glow_full_opacity: ✅ PASS - Top bar glows to opacity=1 and boxShadow '0 0 12px ${col.color}55' on isDraggingOver
verified_features.top_bar_default_065_opacity: ✅ PASS - All 5 top bars have 0.65 opacity by default
verified_features.transitions_200ms: ✅ PASS - All card transitions use 200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)
verified_features.card_state_urgent_4px_border: ✅ PASS - Urgent cards have 4px left border (verified: kanban-card-470e3fd1 with 'borderLeft: 4px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.22)')
verified_features.card_state_urgent_inset_shadow: ✅ PASS - Urgent cards have inset shadow in boxShadow
